name: Clements Gap Wind Farm
current_developer: Pacific Hydro Clements Gap Pty Ltd
notable: 57 MW, 27 Suzlon S88 turbines in the Barunga Range near Port Pirie, SA. Pacific Hydro, A$135M. COD August 2009. One turbine destroyed by fire in February 2024. A co-located 60 MW battery has been proposed.

timeline.title: EPBC Referral 2003/1003
timeline.detail: Clements Gap wind farm — Not Controlled Action (Particular Manner)

timeline.title: Construction commenced
timeline.detail: Pacific Hydro began construction in Mid North SA

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.
